items.name_en: 💕Complete original packaging💕The brand's iconic GG Marmont series masterfully blends classic double G elements and cut-out chain straps to create a modern silhouette. The new camera bag style features light gold-tone exquisite hardware paired with soft pink-beige nappa leather, highlighting the texture of the details.
items.name_cn:
💕Complete original packaging💕The brand's iconic GG Marmont series masterfully blends classic double G elements and cut-out chain straps to create a modern silhouette. The new camera bag style features light gold-tone exquisite hardware paired with soft pink-beige nappa leather, highlighting the texture of the details.
Apricot pink quilted V-shaped nappa leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Gucci Anacapri red viscose lining
Double G
Interior: One slip pocket
Chain shoulder strap height: 60cm
Zip closure
Model: 855273
Dimensions: 24cm (W) x 15cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 0.45kg
Color: Apricot pink/Original leather

items.name_en: 💕Imported original leather💕Complete original packaging💕This brand classic GG Marmont series handbag is crafted from extremely soft nappa leather, adorned with double G hardware and paired with a three-dimensional, multi-faceted chain shoulder strap, making the entire bag structure soft and exquisite.
items.name_cn:
💕Imported original leather💕Complete original packaging💕This brand classic GG Marmont series handbag is crafted from extremely soft nappa leather, adorned with double G hardware and paired with a three-dimensional, multi-faceted chain shoulder strap, making the entire bag structure soft and exquisite.
Apricot pink quilted V-shaped nappa leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Taupe viscose lining
Double G
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Exterior: One slip pocket
Sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (56cm high)
Spring buckle flap

Color: Apricot pink/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Canvas, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie collection debuted at the historic Montecastle in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complemented each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, presented in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that appeared in the 1970s. Rose pink soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap, double-G magnetic snap closure.
